UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific settings, preferences, and display information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

dailyGoalMl.description: The user's daily hydration goal in milliliters.

preferredGlassSizeMl.description: The user's preferred standard glass size in milliliters for logging.

selectedVirtualWorldThemeId.description: Reference to the VirtualWorldTheme entity that the user has currently selected. (Relationship: VirtualWorldTheme 1:N UserProfile)

soundEnabled.description: Indicates if general app sounds are enabled.

celebrationSoundsEnabled.description: Indicates if celebratory sounds for milestones are enabled.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

HydrationLogEntry.title: HydrationLogEntry
HydrationLogEntry.description: Records an individual instance of water intake by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HydrationLogEntry entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity who logged the water. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N HydrationLogEntry)

amountMl.description: The amount of water consumed in milliliters.

timestamp.description: The exact date and time (UTC) when the water was logged.

timezoneOffsetMinutes.description: The timezone offset from UTC in minutes at the time of the log, crucial for correctly determining the local 'day' for aggregation.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the hydration log entry was created.

DailySummary.title: DailySummary
DailySummary.description: Aggregates a user's hydration data for a specific 'hydration day', which is timezone-aware and defines goal attainment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DailySummary entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity this summary belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N DailySummary)

date.description: The local date (YYYY-MM-DD) for which this summary is recorded. This is the user's 'hydration day' considering their timezone.

totalMlConsumed.description: The total amount of water consumed in milliliters for this specific date.

dailyGoalMlAtTimeOfSummary.description: The daily hydration goal in milliliters that was active when this day's summary was finalized or last updated.

goalMet.description: Indicates if the user met their daily hydration goal on this date.

isPerfectDay.description: Indicates if the user not only met their goal but also achieved other 'perfect day' criteria (e.g., consistent intake).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the daily summary was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the daily summary was last updated.

Streak.title: Streak
Streak.description: Tracks a user's ongoing and longest streaks based on specific criteria, such as meeting daily hydration goals.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Streak entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity this streak belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Streak)

type.description: The type of streak being tracked (e.g., 'dailyGoalMet').

currentLength.description: The current number of consecutive days/events in the streak.

longestLength.description: The longest number of consecutive days/events ever achieved for this streak type by the user.

lastAchievedDate.description: The local date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the streak criterion was last met.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the streak was first recorded.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the streak was last updated.

Achievement.title: Achievement
Achievement.description: Defines a gamified achievement that users can unlock within the app.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Achievement entity.

name.description: The name of the achievement (e.g., 'First Full Day', 'Hydration Hero').

description.description: A detailed description of what the achievement entails.

criteriaDescription.description: A human-readable description of the conditions required to unlock the achievement.

triggerCondition.description: A technical string or code snippet defining the conditions to trigger this achievement (e.g., 'totalMl:1000', 'streak:7days').

rewardItemIds.description: References to UnlockableItem entities that are awarded when this achievement is unlocked. (Relationship: Achievement N:N UnlockableItem)

imageUrl.description: URL to the icon or image representing this achievement.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the achievement was defined.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the achievement definition was last updated.

UserAchievement.title: UserAchievement
UserAchievement.description: Records which achievements a specific user has unlocked and when.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserAchievement entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity who unlocked the achievement. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserAchievement)

achievementId.description: Reference to the Achievement entity that was unlocked. (Relationship: Achievement 1:N UserAchievement)

unlockedAt.description: Timestamp when the achievement was unlocked by the user.

ReminderSetting.title: ReminderSetting
ReminderSetting.description: Stores a user's preferences for hydration reminders.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ReminderSetting entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity this reminder setting belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ReminderSetting)

time.description: The time of day for the reminder in HH:MM format (local time).

daysOfWeek.description: An array of numbers representing the days of the week (0 for Sunday, 6 for Saturday) when the reminder should be active.

tone.description: The preferred sound tone for the reminder (e.g., 'chime', 'bell').

enabled.description: Indicates if this specific reminder setting is currently active.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the reminder setting was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the reminder setting was last updated.

VirtualWorldTheme.title: VirtualWorldTheme
VirtualWorldTheme.description: Defines a thematic style for the user's virtual world (e.g., 'Enchanted Garden', 'Serene Island'). Users can select one.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VirtualWorldTheme entity.

name.description: The name of the virtual world theme.

description.description: A description of the theme's aesthetics and concept.

previewImageUrl.description: URL to an image that previews this theme in the selection UI.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the virtual world theme was defined.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the virtual world theme definition was last updated.

WorldStage.title: WorldStage
WorldStage.description: Represents a specific evolutionary stage within a VirtualWorldTheme, each with its own visual appearance and progression requirements.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WorldStage entity.

virtualWorldThemeId.description: Reference to the VirtualWorldTheme this stage belongs to. (Relationship: VirtualWorldTheme 1:N WorldStage)

stageNumber.description: The sequential number of this stage within its theme (e.g., 1, 2, 3) for ordering.

name.description: The name of this specific world stage (e.g., 'Seedling', 'Budding', 'Flowering').

description.description: A description of what this stage represents visually or thematically.

thresholdMlRequired.description: The cumulative total milliliters of hydration required to unlock this stage.

thresholdStreakDaysRequired.description: The longest streak (days of meeting daily goals) required to unlock this stage.

imageUrl.description: URL to the unique image asset representing the visual appearance of this specific world stage.

unlockedItemIds.description: References to UnlockableItem entities that are awarded or become available when this stage is reached. (Relationship: WorldStage N:N UnlockableItem)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the world stage definition was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the world stage definition was last updated.

UnlockableItem.title: UnlockableItem
UnlockableItem.description: Defines a decorative item, badge, or other reward that users can unlock in the app.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UnlockableItem entity.

name.description: The name of the unlockable item.

type.description: The category or type of the item (e.g., 'decoration', 'badge', 'soundscapeTheme').

imageUrl.description: URL to the image asset for this unlockable item.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the unlockable item was defined.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the unlockable item definition was last updated.

UserWorldProgression.title: UserWorldProgression
UserWorldProgression.description: Tracks a specific user's progress within their chosen virtual world theme, including their current stage and unlocked items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserWorldProgression entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity this progression belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserWorldProgression)

virtualWorldThemeId.description: Reference to the VirtualWorldTheme entity that the user is currently progressing through. (Relationship: VirtualWorldTheme 1:N UserWorldProgression)

currentWorldStageId.description: Reference to the WorldStage entity representing the highest stage the user has reached in their selected theme. (Relationship: WorldStage 1:N UserWorldProgression)

totalMlEverConsumedInThisTheme.description: The cumulative total milliliters of hydration consumed by the user while this theme was active, contributing to world progression.

unlockedItemIds.description: References to UnlockableItem entities that the user has unlocked, specific to this theme or overall. (Relationship: UnlockableItem N:N UserWorldProgression)

lastProgressionUpdate.description: Timestamp when the user's world progression was last updated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user's world progression record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user's world progression record was last updated.

EncouragementMessageTemplate.title: EncouragementMessageTemplate
EncouragementMessageTemplate.description: Stores pre-curated templates for encouraging messages, to be used by the contextual encouragement system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the EncouragementMessageTemplate entity.

messageText.description: The raw text of the encouragement message template. May contain placeholders for dynamic content.

contextTrigger.description: A keyword or identifier indicating the context in which this message should be delivered (e.g., 'firstGlassOfDay', 'halfwayToGoal', 'goalMet', 'stageUnlocked').

aiPromptFragment.description: An optional fragment of a prompt for an AI tool, to guide generation of more nuanced messages based on this template.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the message template was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the message template was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user-specific settings, preferences, and display information. Accessible only by the owner.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

definition.description: Records individual water intake for a user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: logId
params.description: The unique ID of the hydration log entry.

definition.description: Aggregates a user's hydration data for a specific 'hydration day'. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: date
params.description: The local date (YYYY-MM-DD) for which the summary is recorded.

definition.description: Tracks a user's ongoing and longest streaks. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: streakType
params.description: The type of streak being tracked (e.g., 'dailyGoalMet').

definition.description: Defines gamified achievements available in the app. Globally readable by authenticated users.

params.name: achievementId
params.description: The unique ID of the achievement definition.

definition.description: Records unlocked achievements for a user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: userAchievementId
params.description: The unique ID of the user's achievement record.

definition.description: Stores a user's personalized hydration reminder preferences. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: reminderSettingId
params.description: The unique ID of the reminder setting.

definition.description: Defines the thematic styles for the virtual worlds. Globally readable by authenticated users.

params.name: themeId
params.description: The unique ID of the virtual world theme.

definition.description: Represents an evolutionary stage within a VirtualWorldTheme. Globally readable. Includes denormalized 'virtualWorldThemeId' for clarity and efficient querying within a theme.

params.name: themeId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent virtual world theme.

params.name: stageId
params.description: The unique ID of the specific world stage.

definition.description: Defines decorative items or rewards users can unlock. Globally readable by authenticated users.

params.name: itemId
params.description: The unique ID of the unlockable item.

definition.description: Tracks a user's progress within a specific virtual world theme. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'virtualWorldThemeId' for authorization independence and contextual retrieval.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: virtualWorldThemeId
params.description: The ID of the virtual world theme this progression record is for.

definition.description: Stores pre-curated templates for encouraging messages. Globally readable by authenticated users.

params.name: templateId
params.description: The unique ID of the encouragement message template.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed to adhere strictly to the CORE DESIGN PRINCIPLES and DESIGN STRATEGY MANDATES, prioritizing security, scalability, and debuggability. All user-specific data is organized under a top-level `/users/{userId}` collection, implementing **Path-Based Ownership**. This ensures that security rules can easily and efficiently verify ownership by comparing `request.auth.uid` with the `{userId}` wildcard in the path, making authorization explicit and minimizing rule complexity.

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL)** is achieved primarily through two mechanisms:
1.  **Hierarchical Paths with Denormalization:** For all subcollections under `/users/{userId}` (e.g., `hydrationLogs`, `dailySummaries`, `streaks`, `userAchievements`, `reminderSettings`, `userWorldProgressions`), the `userId` is explicitly included in the document's fields. This denormalization means that security rules for these subcollections do not need to perform `get()` operations on the parent `UserProfile` document to determine ownership or permissions. Instead, they can directly check `resource.data.userId == request.auth.uid` or `userId == request.auth.uid` (from the path), ensuring atomic operations (transactions, batched writes) remain independent and performant without breaking security rules. For example, a new `HydrationLogEntry` can be created atomically without needing to read the parent `UserProfile` for ownership verification.
2.  **Global Read Collections:** Master data entities like `achievements`, `virtualWorldThemes`, `worldStages`, `unlockableItems`, and `encouragementMessageTemplates` are stored in root-level collections. These are intended to be globally readable by all authenticated users. Their rules will simply check `request.auth != null` for read access, completely avoiding `get()` calls.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters)** are supported through **Structural Segregation**:
*   **User-Specific Data:** By segregating all personal data under `/users/{userId}/...`, any `list` operation performed by an authenticated user on their respective subcollections (e.g., `/users/{request.auth.uid}/hydrationLogs`) will inherently only return data they are authorized to access. The security rules enforce this path-based ownership, guaranteeing that the result set of a query is always fully authorized, thus preventing rules from acting as filters.
*   **Global Master Data:** For globally readable collections (e.g., `/virtualWorldThemes`), `list` operations are intended to retrieve all documents. The security rules allow reads for any authenticated user, ensuring that `list` operations on these collections return the complete set of available entities without filtering, aligning with the QAP principle.

The structure for `WorldStage` explicitly addresses the user's request for uploading individual images for each stage. By creating `/virtualWorldThemes/{themeId}/worldStages/{stageId}`, each stage within a theme is a distinct document capable of holding its own `imageUrl` property, facilitating separate image uploads and management while maintaining its relationship to the parent theme. This hierarchical design for master data also allows for efficient querying of all stages within a specific theme.
